## What does this PR add or change?

<!-- One or two sentences. Link any related issue with "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New guide / documentation
- [ ] New VBO or .NET wrapper (DLL)
- [ ] Fix / correction to existing content
- [ ] Refactor / reorganization (no behavior change)
- [ ] Repo tooling / housekeeping

## Tested with

<!-- Which product versions did you validate this against? -->

- Blue Prism version:
- Other (Edge, .NET, OS, etc.):

## Checklist

- [ ] Everything is in **English** (docs, code comments, commit messages).
- [ ] Docs explain the **root cause and why the fix works**, not just commands.
- [ ] No **client/confidential data** (company names, internal URLs, servers, credentials).
- [ ] For a VBO/DLL: **source code and build script are included**, and it can be rebuilt from scratch.
- [ ] Files and folders use **kebab-case**; new self-contained folders have a `README.md`.
- [ ] Commits follow **[Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)**.
- [ ] The root `README.md` "What's in here right now" section was updated if I added something discoverable.
